title: Phantom Deactivator
description: Do you hate phantoms? Just deactivate them!
body:
**Think:**
You are playing Minecraft and a phantom comes and kills you in your hardcore world.

But when you have this pack, they will disappear!
This pack is made for the people that hate phantoms.

<details>
<summary>How to install?</summary>

1. Download the pack.
2. Copy it to your copy board.
3. Open Minecraft Launcher > Click on Installations > Click on the folder symbole.
4. When you found the _.minecraft_ folder, click on _saves_, select the world you want to add the datapack and paste the datapack into the _datapacks_ folder.

</details>

<details>
<summary>How to uninstall?</summary>

1. Open Minecraft Launcher > Click on Installations > Click on the folder symbole.
2. When you found the _.minecraft_ folder, click on _saves_, select the world you want to remove the datapack, find the _datapacks_ folder and delete the pack.

</details>

You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M).
Have fun with my pack and this is end of the description...

> I want to invite you all to ChowderFin's YouTube channel (@ChowderFin), he makes really good build hacks and simple builds for Minecraft and I'm sure you will like this contents and much of them with downloadable schematics. This is not sponsored by him and he deserves much more subscribers. Thank you!
